title: Centered Item Frames
description: Centers item frames to the middle of the chest for easy access.
body:
This mod modifies the item frame model to center to the middle of the chest when you place them, making it nicer to look at.   



![image of a chest with item frame in the middle](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a14634f6165aa5ddcf60e10768125cef1be5da5a_0.webp)




READ:

This mod is stable and works fine client-side. However, if the server lacks the mod, item frames on the same side of a double chest may overlap. While it's recommended for both client and server, it functions perfectly on the client alone.





Join the [Discord!](https://discord.gg/p6ShJPq98d) You can ask for help, a mod, just suggest something, hangout or request the source code of any mod I have made (if I still have the source code)

Or donate to my [Kofi](https://ko-fi.com/bikerboys) incase you are feeling generous!
